ddt:Target.Name: A-IVI v1.12
ddt:Target.Description:
**** HISTORY ****
For past version check changelog on database v1.9
V1.10 03/10/2018
Updated Auto Ident
Wifi monitoring DID modified as per config file CF_Zen and CF_ZEVCityDriving added Change size of Cluster_sound_volume Change position of Minimum volume set by user
Added Config reference read in Info screen FOTA_Bearer added
Changing DID HMI2 from $2111 to $2110
Structure modification : ParkingAids_UPA_gain ParkingAids_HFP_gain ParkingAids_PSM_gain LateralADAS_LDW_gain LateralADAS_LKA_gain
V1.11 18/12/2018 Change position of CP_Buttons ($0304) request Modification to have snapshot in failures reading Added reset after Factory Mode deactivation Added 2 new DTC $E754 and $E075
Added parameters to HMI config part 2 + sceens CFG_AQI CFG_Messaging CFG_Video CFG_InfotainmentPicture CFG_Animation CFG_PrivacyMode CFG_PictureViewer
Added Parameter CF_ModeAtEngineStart in DID $2321
Modified MEX configuration screens
Values changed CNF_ECOR_VEHTYP CNF_VEH_INFO_CHARGE_CABLEGRP CNF_VEH_INFO_CHGCAB_VEHEND CNF_VEH_INFO_CHG_FACTYPE CNF_VEH_INFO_VEH_CHG_CON CNF_VEH_INFO_CHGCAB_SPTEND
V1.12 03/05/2019
Updated Auto Ident Added XFFph2 as A-IVI project Changed Mex Restart Value Changed CNF_CHG_FACTYPE Possibility to write FM/AM and Generic tuner in the screens

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testNotCompletedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test not complete since last clear

Data.Name: DTCStatus.testFailedSinceLastClear
Data.Comment: DTC Test failes since last clear

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal level out of range/zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component | system operation obstructed or blocked
lost communication with Airbag Control Unit
lost communication with AMP on V1 CAN
lost communication with Advanced driver assistance system
lost communication with Automatic Driver Seat positionning
Lost communication with Automatic Transmission on Powertrain CAN
lost communication with Blind Sport Warning Right
lost communication with Body Control Module
lost communication with Around view monitoring
lost communication with Cluster on V1 CAN
lost communication with Electric Powered Steering on V1 CAN
lost communication with Electronic Stability Control on IC CAN
lost communication with Engine Control Module
lost communication with Four Wheels Steering
lost communication with Cluster on multimedia CAN
lost communication with Hand free Module
lost communication with Head Up display on multimedia CAN
lost communication with Hybrid Electric Vehicle Control
lost communication with Integrated Dynamics-control on chassis CAN
lost communication with Telematic Control Unit on multimedia CAN
lost communication with Telematic Control Unit on V1 CAN
lost communication with Ultra Sonic Adas
lost communication with Underhood Switching Module
lost communication with V-DIST (RSE) on multimedia CAN

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

Data.Name: Status mask
Data.Comment: Mask of DTC status to reply with 1 byte

Item.Text: Test Not Complete Since Last Clear
Radio is in state Off user
Radio is in state On user

Data.Name: CANM.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LIN_IN.Info_Aux_IN_2
Data.Comment: status of auxiliary audio on fascia

Item.Text: No tyre pressure to be dispayed

Data.Name: Radio country
Data.Comment: World area to define tuner frequencies interval

Data.Name: CANV.RefMessagerie
Data.Comment: version édition du document décrivant la messagerie CAN-M

Item.Text: Nav function and Nav HMI enabled
Nav function and Nav HMI disabled

Data.Name: SWRC_rotary."7"UpToDown
Data.Comment: key status "7" up to down rotary

Item.Text: Rotary switch turned Up to Down

Data.Name: SWRC_rotary."7"DownToUp
Data.Comment: key status "7" down to up" rotary

Item.Text: Rotary switch turned Down to Up
Bose 5.1ch MCAN Amplifier (future extension) / Not applicable for Renault
external ANC box for only front
wirh AUX and without Pin detection
with AUX and with Pin detection
NAR (Amercian style i.e. user guided entry flow.)
JPN (Japanese style i.e. user guided fixed entry flow.)
(Ascending order, Nearest charging station to Farthest charging station)
(Descending order, Farthest charging station to Nearest charging station)

Data.Name: System_Information.EV & PHEV real time Energy Flow display
Data.Comment: EV & PHEV real time Energy Flow display

Data.Name: System_Information.EV & PHEV Energy Flow 15mn historical graph
Data.Comment: EV & PHEV Energy Flow 15mn historical graph

Item.Text: CMF1 7 inches central panel carry back

Data.Name: Lock out development configuration.Video playing restriction
Lock out development configuration.Picture slideshow restriction
Lock out development configuration.SMS text input restriction
Lock out development configuration.Features tutorials restriction
Lock out development configuration.System user handbook restriction
Lock out development configuration.Text input restriction
Lock out development configuration.Phone dial input restriction
Lock out development configuration.Navigation destination input restriction
Lock out development configuration.Music/radio cover dsplay restriction
Lock out development configuration.General HMI restriction
Lock out development configuration.Service activation restriction
Lock out development configuration.Displayed text lenght restriction
Lock out development configuration.HMI animations restriction
Lock out development configuration.Stationary picture indiction restriction
Lock out development configuration.One by one line operation nonMusic list scroll restriction
Data.Comment: One by one line operation nonMusic list scroll restriction

Data.Name: Lock out development configuration.Smooth map scrool operation restriction
Lock out development configuration.Dragging operation restriction
Lock out development configuration.Pinch in/out operation restriction
Lock out development configuration.User profile restriction
Lock out development configuration.Home menu edition restriction
Lock out development configuration.Camera settings restriction
Lock out development configuration.Map rotation restriction
Lock out development configuration.Picture/text background display restriction
Lock out development configuration.Nissan 5-operation count restriction
Lock out development configuration.Nissan 8-operation count restriction
Lock out development configuration.Renault 5-operation count restriction
Lock out development configuration.Renault 8-operation count restriction
Lock out development configuration.Audio play automatically restriction
Lock out development configuration.System update restriction
Lock out development configuration.One by one line operation Music list scroll restriction
Data.Comment: One by one line operation Music list scroll restriction

Data.Name: ANT1.current level Field strength on antenna 1
ANT1.current Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna1 Frequency Tune $xxxx [KHz], 1KHz step if AM ex : 585 KHz -> $20 20 35 38 35

Data.Name: ANT2.current level Field strength on antenna 2
ANT2.current Frequency value
Data.Comment: Antenna2 Frequency value $xxxx, [MHz], 0.1MHz step if FM ex : 100.3 MHz -> $20 31 30 30 33

Item.Text: TPW is NOT present & TPMS is NOT present
TPW is NOT present & TPMS is present
TPW is present & TPMS is NOT present
display torque split and clinometer HMI
verified configuration for use in customer vehicle
input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll tuning
improved input d_pitch + estimated d_yaw/roll + residual d_x/y tuning
ADASIS provider function, Voice guidance function for AD2, Setting function for AD2 are required
with driver and passenger easy access

Data.Name: Custom cypress touch.Number of TX clocks
Custom cypress touch.XY Filter Move Thold
Custom cypress touch.XY Filter Fast Thold
Custom cypress touch.XY Filter Slow Coeff
Custom cypress touch.XY Filter Fast Coeff
Custom cypress touch.Fat Finger Deflection Limit
Custom cypress touch.Freq Hopping Operational Mode
Custom cypress touch.Freq Hopping Noise Threshhold
Custom cypress touch.Freq Hopping Refresh Counter Threshold
Custom display.Touchscreen Controller I2C address (bootloader mode)
Custom display.Touchscreen Controller I2C address (operating mode)

Item.Text: Wifi is off or in hotspot mode
Wifi is in hotspot mode without internet sharing
Wifi is in hotspot mode with internet sharing
Wifi is in hotspot mode due to Carplay Wireless
Slot 6 (Old Nissan cars OR Nissan EV cars)
Without TCU (Not activate USB DTC detection nor MCAN communication)
With eCall (Not activate USB DTC detection but activate MCAN communication)
Without TCU or With eCall (Use MCAN auto-configuration. Not activate USB DTC detection even if TCU is auto-configured)
With TCU (Activate USB DTC detection and MCAN communication)
Without TCU or with TCU (Use MCAN auto-configuration. Activate USB DTC detection if TCU is auto-configured)
China specific AC + China specific DC
Without (IT-System shall not show Meter Setting ICON.)
With (IT-System shall show Meter Setting ICON.)
Rest of the world : Group 1 + Group 2 + Group 4
France specific : Group 1 + Group 2 + Group 3 + Group 4
ADASIS provider function, Voice guidance function for AD2, Setting function for AD2 are required
ACC with V-CAN wake-up (Nissan other vehicles)

Data.Name: Routinestatus
Data.Comment: Read the status of the routine

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ECUReset.keyoffon
Request.Comment: Key OFF / Key ON Reset of ECU

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Extended
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportNumberOfDTCByStatusMask
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

DataItem.Name: ANT2.current level Field strength on antenna 2
ANT1.current level Field strength on antenna 1

Label.Text: - force configuration to be taken into account
- reset configuration parameters to default values
Key off / key on reset is used to :
- force configuration to be taken into account
Please read description before pressing button it can lead to block your target

Button.Text: Read Mileage of the last occurrence counter

Label.Text: BUTTONS- CENTRAL PANEL, CD CDRIVE, TOUCH
Note : If you as a user, are confronted to some difficulties with the database, or have ideas to improve it, please send this info to this address: Sheela.Hariharan@rntbci.com

/!\ If not done it can lead to block your head unit /!\
Load your initial configuration on read/write configuration tab
/!\ If not done it can lead to block your head unit /!\
By using this request, ECU should be able to eject a CD
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
By using this request, ECU should be able to set a tuner to the requested frequency
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine is used to test microphone.
ECU generates a sound on the stereo output and checks if the sound is captured by microphone.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
By using this request, ECU should be able to issue a tone following loudspeaker line number, frequency and sound level given as parameters.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine displays a permanent black screen:
This routine displays a permanent white screen:
This routine displays a cyclic black-white screen sequence (3 times):
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
By using this request, ECU should be able to activate System ON level
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This routine is used to check rear view camera functionality.
This routine displays rear view picture.
This routine is used to calibrate rear view camera guidelines settings.
If display does not turn back to normal after STOP, please perform a HW reset.
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When requested by diag tool, ECU should send command to reset touch controller
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
When requested by diag tool, Bluetooth RSSI & Link quality should be returned. Conditions: Mobile phone must be connected.

When requested by diag tool, Self diagnosis status should be returned. This is a restricted diag services and will not work when vehicle is in running condition, i.e: Vehicle Speed Signal is Available and Vehicle Speed > 0
